topics.title: Discovery portal overview
topics.summary: The portal is an adaptive property-transformation assessment. It captures business context, operational pain points, technology maturity, risks, pilot priorities, preferred delivery model, interfaces, budget and success outcomes.
details: Questions adapt to earlier answers
Every question includes explainable feedback
Users can review and reverse decisions before generating a report
Assessment data is stored locally in this GitHub Pages demonstration

topics.title: Adaptive wizard behaviour
topics.summary: Conditional questions appear only when relevant. WhatsApp automation adds conversation-volume questions, maintenance adds SLA questions, and POPIA risk adds consent-recording questions.
details: Progress recalculates automatically
Inactive conditional answers are removed
Completed sections remain editable

topics.title: Recommended pilot scope
topics.summary: A credible pilot should be narrow, measurable and governed. Start with a property register, one or two high-value workflows, reporting, a small set of user interfaces and explicit acceptance criteria.
details: Avoid too many interfaces in the first release
Assign owners to KPIs and controls
Use a phased delivery model when systems are fragmented

topics.title: Risk and governance
topics.summary: Priority controls include POPIA consent and retention, role-based access, audit logging, payment reconciliation, service continuity, evidence ownership and escalation paths.
details: Each control needs an owner
Define evidence and review cadence
Use server-side secrets and audited integrations in production

topics.title: WhatsApp integration
topics.summary: Production WhatsApp requires Meta WhatsApp Cloud API or an approved BSP, verified webhooks, opt-in evidence, template governance, rate controls, human escalation and secure server-side credentials.
details: GitHub Pages cannot safely hold tokens
Use a secure backend webhook
Persist consent and conversation audit records

topics.title: Target architecture
topics.summary: The production architecture should separate the static user interface from secure backend services. Reuse existing systems, establish governed identifiers and APIs, then add automation and AI.
details: Recommended services include Azure Functions or Container Apps
Use Entra ID for administrative access
Use Key Vault for secrets and Application Insights for telemetry

topics.title: Commercial approach
topics.summary: Use a fixed-fee discovery, a bounded pilot with acceptance criteria, and then a managed-service or SaaS operating model. Scope must align with budget, interface count and internal support capability.
details: Low budgets favour integration-first pilots
Custom builds require stronger support and governance
Commercial assumptions should be validated before delivery

topics.title: Repository implementation
topics.summary: The repository is a static GitHub Pages application. The main entry point is index.html, with adaptive wizard, Skunkie assistant, runtime recovery, styling and knowledge assets under assets and knowledge.
details: CI validates JavaScript syntax and asset references
GitHub Actions builds a complete _site artifact
No Supabase dependency is used

topics.title: Accessibility and responsive design
topics.summary: The portal supports system, light and dark themes, keyboard focus, responsive layouts, reduced-motion preferences, live regions and reversible navigation.
details: Mobile chat becomes a near-full-screen sheet
Desktop chat remains a bounded floating panel
Animations stop when reduced motion is enabled

topics.title: Recommended next steps
topics.summary: Validate the assessment with decision-makers, confirm KPIs, map systems and data owners, agree the pilot backlog, assign risk controls, approve the commercial model and schedule implementation kickoff.
details: Confirm assumptions marked as estimates
Define acceptance criteria
Create a production backend before enabling external AI or WhatsApp
